title: Joshua Ndipyola Banda v Attorney General (2022/CCZ/0010) [2023] ZMCC 15 (26 October 2023)
case_name: Joshua Ndipyola Banda v Attorney General
issue_tags: Judicial Complaints Commission jurisdiction over pre-appointment conduct; Article 143/144 removal procedure
mandatory requirement to report prima facie case and suspend judge; Article 266
gross misconduct includes corruption; procedural irregularity not remedied where substantive outcome established; relief refused as futile.
outcome_detail: 30] In sum, the Petition fails for the reasons advanced herein
